queries.question: Give me the type of property that every land trust has.
queries.sql: SELECT Properties.typeOfProperty  from Land_Trusts_Properties join Properties on Land_Trusts_Properties.propertyId = Properties.propertyId join Land_Trusts on Land_Trusts_Properties.landTrustId = Land_Trusts.id   GROUP BY Land_Trusts_Properties.propertyId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Land_Trusts_Properties.landTrustId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Land_Trusts)

queries.question: Give me the type of property that every land trust has.
queries.sql: select land_trusts.trustname , properties.typeofproperty from Land_Trusts_Properties join Properties on Land_Trusts_Properties.propertyId = Properties.propertyId join Land_Trusts on Land_Trusts_Properties.landTrustId = Land_Trusts.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?trustname ?typeofproperty WHERE {
  ?land_trusts_properties a :Land_Trusts_Properties .
  ?properties a :Properties .
  ?land_trusts_properties p:hasProperties ?properties .
  ?land_trusts a :Land_Trusts .
  ?land_trusts_properties p:hasLand_Trusts ?land_trusts .
  ?land_trusts p:trustName ?trustname .
  ?properties p:typeOfProperty ?typeofproperty .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the type of property that every land trust has.
